title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 70.505 - Expenses reimbursed
text:
70.505.  Expenses reimbursed. — Missouri members of the metropolitan culture district commission appointed pursuant to section 70.500 shall be reimbursed for actual and necessary expenses incurred in the performance of their official duties.
(L. 1993 H.B. 759 & 772 § 3)
